day1_night_start.name: Me
day1_night_start.text: *Back home. I haven't even finished unpacking yet, but I collapse onto the bed.*

day1_night_2.name: Me
day1_night_2.text: *New school, new people. Everyone was kind. Seems like a good school.*

day1_night_recall_sea.name: Me
day1_night_recall_sea.text: *Sea... She's the class president, and she looked after me from day one. Even packed lunch for two. She's really thoughtful.*

day1_night_recall_eunsu.name: Me
day1_night_recall_eunsu.text: *Ms. Eunsu was warm too. That line — 'So you've finally come' — stuck with me a little... but it's probably just a figure of speech.*

day1_night_3.name: Me
day1_night_3.text: *Not bad for a first day. I think I can adjust just fine.*

day1_night_phone.name: Me
day1_night_phone.text: *I check my phone. Messages from friends at my old school... none.*

day1_night_phone_2.name: Me
day1_night_phone_2.text: *Well, everyone's probably busy. I should reach out first sometime.*

day1_night_phone_sea_2.name: Me
day1_night_phone_sea_2.text: *Sea: 'Today was fun! What do you want for lunch tomorrow?'*

day1_night_phone_sea_3.name: Me
day1_night_phone_sea_3.text: *Already planning tomorrow's lunch on the first day. ...She really is warm-hearted.*

day1_night_seolhwa_hint.name: Me
day1_night_seolhwa_hint.text: *...Wait. That girl in the back row. What was her name again? Nobody seemed to notice her... but she was definitely sitting there.*

day1_night_sleep.name: Me
day1_night_sleep.text: *I pull the covers up. Wonder what tomorrow will bring.*

day1_night_sleep_2.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_2.text: *...Right before I fall asleep, I thought I saw something flash outside the window. ...Probably just a dream.*
